---
title: "Frances Charlotte Perceval"
---

## Frances Charlotte Perceval

**Dates:** (<i>c</i>. 1826-3 September 1846)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. and Hon. Arthur Perceval

### Biography

She was known as ‘Fanny’ and is described as having been in a decline for a long time (19 Sept 1846).

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
